# dependencytrack_tags (Data Source)

Retrieves all tags from Dependency-Track along with their usage counts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch all tags along with their usage counts
data "dependencytrack_tags" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of this data source result (always `tags`).
- `tags` (Attributes List) List of tags (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the tag
- `notification_rule_count` (Number) The number of notification rules tagged with this tag
- `policy_count` (Number) The number of policies tagged with this tag
- `project_count` (Number) The number of projects tagged with this tag
